instructionalDaysDescription: This page summarizes published Henderson County Public Schools Traditional/HCEC calendar dates; confirm exact instructional-day counts with HCPS if needed.
seoTitle: Henderson County Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View Henderson County Public Schools NC calendar 2026-2027. Find first day of school, holidays, winter break, spring break, PDF and downloadable calendar files.
calendarNotes: Henderson County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 21, 2027 with early dismissal. Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 22-26. The calendar also lists optional and required teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, early dismissal, and inclement-weather notes. A separate Flex calendar is available from the district.

customSections.label: About Henderson County Public Schools Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families often need more than a PDF calendar. This Henderson County Public Schools 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC calendar page organizes HCPS dates by school breaks, student attendance checkpoints, teacher workdays, annual leave dates, early dismissal, and downloadable calendar formats so parents can quickly plan childcare, travel, transportation, and school activities. The school year begins on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 21, 2027 with early dismissal. Henderson County Public Schools also publishes a separate Flex calendar, so families should confirm which calendar applies to their student.

groups.label: This HCPS calendar page includes

Student holidays, teacher workdays, annual leave dates, and early dismissal notes.
Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, official PDF access, and one-time ICS calendar downloads.

customSections.label: Henderson County Public Schools District Overview
customSections.content: Henderson County Public Schools serves students and families in Henderson County, North Carolina, with district operations centered around the Hendersonville area. The district publishes multiple calendar options, including the Traditional/HCEC calendar summarized on this page and a separate Flex calendar for programs that follow a different schedule. For calendar planning, families should identify which HCPS calendar applies to their student before using first day, break, teacher workday, early dismissal, or last day dates.

groups.label: Calendar entity signals
items: Calendar types: Traditional/HCEC calendar and separate Flex calendar options.

customSections.label: HCPS 2026-2027 Calendar Highlights
customSections.content: Henderson County Public Schools begins the 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 21, 2027. Use this quick reference for the most-searched HCPS calendar dates before reviewing the full monthly date list.

customSections.label: How We Verify Henderson County Public Schools Calendar Dates
customSections.content: MySchoolDates reviews the publicly available Henderson County Public Schools district calendar page and the official Traditional/HCEC calendar PDF linked for this school year. Key dates such as the first student day, last student day, winter break, spring break, Thanksgiving break, teacher workdays, annual leave dates, and early dismissal are compared against the published source before the page and calendar file are generated. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with HCPS, so families should confirm last-minute schedule revisions with Henderson County Public Schools directly.

customSections.label: Calendar Update History
customSections.content: The Henderson County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar was last updated on MySchoolDates on July 21, 2026 after review against the publicly available HCPS Traditional/HCEC calendar source. Future changes will be reviewed after district announcements, revised PDFs, emergency schedule changes, or weather-related calendar updates.

rows: Initial publication and verification against the HCPS Traditional/HCEC calendar PDF.
District revisions, emergency closures, or revised source documents will be reviewed when available.

customSections.label: Important Dates for Henderson County Families
customSections.content: These are the dates Henderson County families most often use for school-year planning. The full date list below includes additional teacher workdays, annual leave dates, holidays, and early dismissal notes.

rows: This is the key back-to-school date for transportation, childcare, orientation, and family work schedules.
Families planning Thanksgiving travel should note that students are out from Wednesday through Friday.
Winter Break creates the longest mid-year holiday period, with January 4 listed as an optional teacher workday.
Spring Break is the main spring travel window before the final stretch of the school year.
The final student day includes early dismissal, so pickup and after-school plans may need adjustment.

customSections.label: About Henderson County Public Schools
customSections.content: Henderson County Public Schools is a public school district serving families in Henderson County, North Carolina, including the Hendersonville area and surrounding communities in Western North Carolina. HCPS publishes annual school calendars so families, students, educators, and staff can plan around student attendance days, holidays, teacher workdays, annual leave dates, early dismissal, inclement-weather notes, and program-specific schedules. The Traditional/HCEC calendar applies to many students, while the Flex calendar may apply to specific programs or school schedules.

customSections.label: Planning Around the HCPS School Calendar
customSections.content: Families in Hendersonville and Henderson County use the HCPS calendar to plan childcare, transportation, appointments, holiday travel, and school-year routines. The most important planning dates are the first day of school, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher workdays, annual leave days, early dismissal, and the final student day.

groups.label: Summer and school-year planning
items: The 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC school year begins on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 21, 2027.
Families planning summer activities should use the final student day and post-year teacher workdays as separate planning markers.

groups.label: Holiday travel and breaks
items: Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break are the main travel windows for students on the Traditional/HCEC calendar.
Winter Break runs across the New Year's Day holiday, with an optional teacher workday listed on January 4, 2027.

groups.label: Teacher workdays and early dismissal
items: Optional and required teacher workdays should be treated as student no-school planning dates unless HCPS announces a make-up change.
The last day of school includes early dismissal at 12:00 noon, which can affect transportation and after-school care.

customSections.label: HCPS Traditional vs Flex Calendar Comparison
customSections.content: Henderson County Public Schools publishes a Traditional/HCEC calendar and a separate Flex calendar. This page summarizes the Traditional/HCEC calendar; families in flex-calendar programs should use the official alternate PDF linked by the district.

rows: Most families following the district's traditional school-year schedule
Use this page for first day, last day, holidays, teacher workdays, annual leave, early dismissal, winter break, and spring break.
Families in programs assigned to the Flex calendar
Use the separate Flex PDF because first day, breaks, and workdays may differ.
Students with athletics, testing, performances, or program-specific events
Confirm school-level events through your assigned school.

customSections.label: HCPS Calendar Changes: 2025-2026 vs 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families comparing Henderson County Public Schools calendar years should review first day timing, last day timing, break dates, teacher workdays, and early dismissal before making long-range plans.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Henderson County Public Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Henderson County Public Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Henderson County Public Schools in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 21, 2027, with early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Does HCPS have a Flex calendar for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The district publishes a separate 2026-2027 Flex calendar linked as an alternate calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Henderson County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027. January 4, 2027 is listed as an optional teacher workday.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Henderson County Public Schools have school tomorrow?
calendarFaqs.a: School attendance depends on the current calendar date and any HCPS announcements. Families should verify unexpected closures, weather changes, and make-up day decisions directly with Henderson County Public Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: Does HCPS close school for weather?
calendarFaqs.a: Weather closures and emergency schedule changes are announced by Henderson County Public Schools. This calendar shows planned dates from the published calendar, not real-time emergency closures.

calendarFaqs.q: Does HCPS have early dismissal days?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC calendar lists an early dismissal at 12:00 noon on December 18, 2026 and an early dismissal on the final student day, May 21, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Do HCPS teacher workdays mean students are out of school?
calendarFaqs.a: Optional and required teacher workdays are planning dates when students generally do not attend regular classes. Families should still confirm school-specific schedules and any weather make-up changes with HCPS.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the HCPS 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: The official instructional-day count should be verified from the Henderson County Public Schools published calendar because teacher workdays, annual leave dates, early dismissal, and weather-related calendar adjustments can affect how totals are counted. This page summarizes the published Traditional/HCEC calendar dates rather than treating the instructional-day count as an official district statement.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the HCPS calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official PDF link on this page to download the Henderson County Public Schools 2026-2027 Traditional/HCEC calendar. MySchoolDates also provides a one-time ICS calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

calendarFaqs.q: Is MySchoolDates the official Henderson County Public Schools website?
calendarFaqs.a: No. MySchoolDates is an independent calendar reference and is not affiliated with Henderson County Public Schools. Always verify last-minute schedule changes with HCPS.
